title: Cryptographic Agility, Dependencies, FIPS, and Policy Evidence · Runtime Contract: Crypto Go Agility Without Downgrade
summary: A compliance document lists approved algorithms but not the executing module, configuration, boundary, certificate status, dependencies, exceptions, or operating procedures. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agility without downgrade increment in algorithm inventory and compliance evidence packet. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case p…
objectives: Centralize policy and versioned suites, authenticate selection, reject unknowns, measure use, retain read compatibility, and remove obsolete write paths.
Maintain machine-readable use, purpose, owner, suite, key location, dependency, data lifetime, protocol, version, and migration state for cryptographic assets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Agility Without Downgrade · Theory Crypto Go Agility Without…
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 4476 during a replicated device restart. Build deterministic Go evidence to bind crypto inventory, Go and module versions, policy enforcement, honest compliance status, and expiring exceptions; preserve accessible status, non-color meaning, keyboard operation, error recovery, and secret-safe diagnostics; then repeat or roll back a nonce, sequence, or key version and reject the stale state. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Crypto Go Agility Without Downgrade contract for the supplied data.
